Mount Olympus summit where marble colonnades pierce golden clouds, eternal fires burning in bronze braziers beside thrones of polished stone.
Valhalla's vast hall with roof of golden shields, eight hundred doors wide, where mead-benches stretch beneath raven-watched rafters.
Avalon's mist-wrapped shores where white apple trees bloom eternally, their silver branches heavy with fruit above crystal springs.
Mictlan's nine descending levels carved through obsidian darkness, rivers of blood flowing between bone-strewn caverns toward final oblivion.
Bifrost's rainbow bridge arcing from Asgard's golden walls to Yggdrasil's massive trunk, shimmering with frost-giant light.
Takamagahara's celestial plain where vermillion torii gates frame the sun's rising path across clouds of woven gold.
Tir na nOg's green hills crowned with spiral burial mounds, hawthorn trees blooming white above streams that never age.
Xibalba's bone palace rising from cavern depths, skull-carved pillars supporting vaults where jade waters reflect no light.
Oshun's sacred river flowing gold-flecked through Nigerian forests, amber waters pooling near shrines draped with honey-colored cloth.
Mount Meru's cosmic axis ascending through seven heavens, terraced gardens of celestial jewels spiraling around its diamond peak.
Duat's starlit river winding through twelve cavern-hours, judgment halls with feather-scales standing beside pools reflecting constellation-paths of Ra's barque.
Elysian Fields spreading in endless asphodel meadows beneath amber skies, marble gymnasiums and laurel groves bordering streams of forgetfulness.
Jade Emperor's celestial palace with nine-tiered pagodas of white nephrite, peach orchards of immortality blooming beside phoenix-guarded vermillion gates.
Ekur ziggurat climbing seven colored platforms toward heaven, cedar doors plated with bronze opening to star-observation chambers at Enlil's summit.
Dreamtime songlines etched across red desert stone, waterholes circled by ochre handprints where serpent-tracks curve through spinifex toward creation.
Dilmun's paradise garden where date palms never wither, freshwater springs bursting from sand beside lapis-paved temples under perpetual dawn.
Vaikuntha's lotus-island floating on cosmic ocean, gold pavilions resting on Shesha's thousand hoods while milk-seas lap at gem-studded shores.
Cenote of Chichen Itza plunging emerald-deep through limestone, jade offerings glinting on submerged altars where sunlight pierces to underworld waters.
Sedna's ocean-floor palace built from whalebone and kelp forests, currents swirling through chambers where seal-spirits gather in bioluminescent grottos.
Brú na Bóinne's chambered mound aligned to winter solstice, spiral-carved stones guarding passage where light penetrates once yearly to inner sanctum.
Tollan's golden pyramids crowned with feathered-serpent temples, jade causeways crossing sacred plazas where morning star alignments guide priest-astronomers' observations.
Pure Land's western paradise with seven-tiered lotus pools, jeweled trees chiming celestial music above platforms where dharma-wheels turn in perfumed winds.
Irij's distant island beyond mortal seas, world-tree roots anchoring its shores where birds of paradise nest in branches connecting earth to starlit heavens.
Mount Fuji's sacred peak where torii gates mark Amaterasu's dawn-path, volcanic crater holding mirror-lake reflecting sun-disc through ascending prayer-ribbons.
Thunderbird mountain rising through storm-clouds, lightning-scarred summit holding nest of massive branches where eagle-spirits command weather across four directions.
River Styx coiling nine times through Hades' depths, black waters reflecting no stars as cypress groves lean over ferry-landing stones worn smooth.
Takachiho's sun-cave sealed with sacred rope, divine light seeping through stone cracks where kagura stages face the boulder-blocked celestial doorway.
Mount Kailash's crystal pyramid where four sacred rivers pour from ice-walls, meditation caves carved in granite circling the axis connecting earth to heavens.
Annwn's otherworld fortress across glass bridges, cauldron-halls lit by unquenchable flames where silver apple orchards grow beside wells of inspiration.
Rainbow Serpent's waterhole reflecting Dreamtime sky, billabong waters churning where creation-tracks emerge from depths carving valleys across ancient stone country.
Olympus thunderhead summit where empty lightning-throne commands cloudscape, storm-winds howling through columns of solidified sky wreathed in perpetual tempest.
Aaru's reed fields stretching endlessly beside turquoise canals, barley growing head-high where blessed souls harvest grain beneath two suns forever.
Tuonela's river of black swans flowing through Finnish underworld, iron-grey waters dividing mist-shrouded banks of birch and frozen stone.
Mount Kunlun's jade terraces ascending nine tiers, peach orchards of immortality surrounding celestial pools where dragon-veins pulse with earth's qi.
Mag Mell's plain of honey beneath silver-clouded skies, crystal halls rising from flowered meadows where time dissolves near foam-crowned western shores.
Yomi's shadowed cavern-realm sealed by boulder of a thousand warriors, peach trees marking boundary between putrefaction-halls and living world above.
Axis mundi baobab splitting earth from sky, roots plunging to ancestral waters while crown shelters star-spirits across savanna stretching to horizon.
Jotunheim's ice-fortress carved from glacial cliffs, frost-halls glittering above crevasses where aurora ribbons dance through giant-realm's perpetual twilight.
Tien's nine-layered heaven bureaucracy with registry-pavilions of sandalwood, incense smoke rising past examination halls toward jade-tablet archives of fate.
Lake Titicaca's reed-island temple floating above creation-depths, stone gateways framing sun-alignment where earth emerged from primordial waters.
Hvergelmir's churning spring at Niflheim's frozen heart, eleven venomous rivers flowing from beneath Yggdrasil's deepest root through ice-encrusted stone.
Otherworld Annwn's spiral-castle on glass island, salmon-pools circling bronze foundations where mist conceals treasures beneath towers of impossible geometry.
Shambhala's hidden valley ringed by snow-peaks, crystal stupas rising from lotus-gardens where time moves differently beneath perpetual rainbow halos.
Pulotu's Polynesian underworld with coconut groves beneath earth, freshwater springs flowing upward through volcanic caves toward ancestors' resting platforms.
Agartha's subterranean sun illuminating crystal cities, concentric rings of temples descending toward earth's hollow core through phosphorescent cavern-cathedrals.
Svarga's heaven-realm on Mount Meru's eastern slope, wish-fulfilling trees shading coral pavilions beside nymphs' bathing pools of liquid moonlight.
Irkalla's Mesopotamian netherworld with dust-filled chambers, seven gates descending through clay-brick walls where the dead dwell in silent darkness.
Tlalocan's paradise of eternal spring rains, jade-green terraces overflowing with maize and cacao beneath mountains draped in perpetual flowering vines.
Hawaiki's ancestral homeland beyond Pacific horizons, volcanic peaks emerging from sacred waters where migration canoes departed toward dawn's constellation-paths.
Heliopolis's primordial mound rising from Nun's chaos-waters, benben stone marking creation-point where first sunlight touched lotus-emerging pyramid.
